name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement to existing skills or core guidance
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the gap or limitation.

## Proposed Solution

How you'd like to see it addressed.

## Which part of the toolkit does this affect?

- [ ] Core mental model (`core/architecture-thinking.md`)
- [ ] Core instructions or workflows
- [ ] An existing skill (which one: ___)
- [ ] Output adapters
- [ ] Templates
- [ ] Documentation

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Links, examples, or references to industry standards.
